description: Beta patch: bundle the Polygon spec bootstrap skill in the CLI package and clarify Codex CLI 0.131+ timeout-bounds requirements.
changelog:
**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(skills): `polygon-spec-bootstarp` is now included under `dist/templates/common/bundled-skills/`, so fresh `polygon init` and `polygon update` install the built-in spec bootstrap skill and track its reference files.
- fix(docs): the v0.6.0-beta.19 changelog now states that the full Codex `multi_agent_v2` timeout-bounds config requires Codex CLI 0.131.0+.
notes: Beta patch on top of 0.6.0-beta.19. Run `polygon update` to install the bundled `polygon-spec-bootstarp` skill. Codex users should use Codex CLI 0.131.0+ for the full multi_agent_v2 timeout-bounds config.
